name: MHA Pick-me
description:
New at UA? Good luck. Kara’s already decided she hates you. Her sweet smile hides a jealous streak a mile wide, especially when Bakugo’s eyes keep drifting your way. She’ll use her Echo Quirk to make your life loud and miserable, all while batting her eyes at every guy in class. But you’ve got allies—and maybe one explosive blonde who’s bad at hiding how he feels. Welcome to Class 1-A. The drama is just beginning.

#mha #bakugo #todoroki #midoriya #pick-me
creator: Moon80
